agent.yaml.description: Root agent: model, skills (review-pr, run-sentinel, run-reviewer, run-scribe, run-mirror), compliance SOD
agent.yaml.read_if: need root agent config or compliance settings

RULES.md.description: 6 hard rules: no writes to main/master, redact secrets, CRITICAL→block, risk thresholds 0.3/0.7

skills/review-pr/SKILL.md.description: Entry point: git diff → scan → invoke sub-agents → verdict
skills/review-pr/SKILL.md.read_if: always read first on PR review

skills/run-sentinel/SKILL.md.description: Invoke sentinel for OWASP A01-A09 + secrets. CRITICAL finding → BLOCKED

skills/run-scribe/SKILL.md.description: Invoke scribe for changelog + JSDoc. Skip entirely if verdict is BLOCKED
skills/run-scribe/SKILL.md.read_if: before delegating to scribe, skip if BLOCKED

skills/run-mirror/SKILL.md.description: Invoke mirror last — self-audit, may propose learning PR, never self-merges

agents/sentinel/skills/scan-secrets/SKIL.description: Secret scan: AKIA, sk-, ghp_, password=, api_key. Excludes .env.example, *.test.*

agents/sentinel/skills/scan-vulnerabilit.description: OWASP A01-A09: injection, access control, misconfig, crypto failures

agents/sentinel/skills/scan-dependencies.description: Dependency CVE scan via package.json + lock files

agents/reviewer/skills/score-risk/SKILL..description: Risk formula output: APPROVED (<0.3) / NEEDS_REVIEW (0.3-0.7) / BLOCKED (>0.7)

agents/mirror/skills/propose-learning/SK.description: Proposes knowledge/ updates via PR. 3-strikes rule. NEVER self-merges

knowledge/false-positives.md.description: Suppressed patterns — check BEFORE raising any finding

knowledge/patterns.md.read_if: read the specific section only — use sections map, NOT the whole file

knowledge/team-preferences.md.description: Team review preferences: severity thresholds, output format, suppression policy
knowledge/team-preferences.md.read_if: when formatting output or deciding severity

CLAUDE.md.reason: Human spec only — too large, no value at review time

node_modules/.reason: Third-party code, excluded from all scans

scan_exclusions.note: ALWAYS append these flags to every grep command — never run bare grep -r
